---
name: Task
about: Track contributor-friendly work such as docs, cleanup, tests, or small fixes
title: "[Task] "
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the work item and why it matters.

## Scope

- What is included
- What is intentionally out of scope

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The change is implemented
- [ ] The behavior is documented if needed
- [ ] The result has been tested locally

## Notes for Contributors

- Point to the relevant page, module, or integration.
- Add any setup steps or caveats needed to reproduce the task.
- Link follow-up work if the task should be split into smaller issues.
